---
title: "FRAIMEL · 前卫研究者"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    page-layout: full
    include-in-header: assets/landing-head.html
    include-after-body: assets/landing-after-body.html
---

<!-- === HERO SECTION === -->
<section id="hero" class="relative min-h-screen flex items-center justify-center text-center overflow-hidden">
  <div id="particles-js"></div>

  <div class="content-wrapper p-4">
      <h1 class="text-5xl md:text-7xl font-extrabold text-white animate-fade-in">
          Liam Chen
      </h1>
      <p class="mt-4 text-xl md:text-3xl font-medium text-cyan-400 animate-fade-in-delay-1">
          拓扑数据分析 & 神经形态计算
      </p>
      <p class="mt-2 text-lg md:text-xl text-gray-400 animate-fade-in-delay-2">
          探索高维数据的隐藏结构与未来算法的形态
      </p>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- === 下面粘 ABOUT / RESEARCH / CONTACT 等 HTML 内容 === -->

<div class="content-wrapper max-w-6xl mx-auto p-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 space-y-24 mb-24">
  <!-- your HTML sections here -->
</div>
